violations.text: The current food safety manager license for the location is expired and in need of reinstatement. Owner is to reinstate or have another employee certified in food safety apply for the Food Safety Manager License. Application for Food Safety Manager License supplied at time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. PIC to instruct staff to sanitize at the 3-bay sink until sanitizer is properly working in the dish machine. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

Salmon Lox are served raw/undercooked to the customer's request. A written consumer advisory (on the menu, table tent, or placard) is not provided to the consumer informing them of the significantly increased risk associated with certain vulnerable consumers eating such food in a raw or undercooked form. A consumer advisory with as asterisk is to be added to the menu board and paper menus along with an asterisk at the food item(s) alerting to the consumer advisory. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. The Sanitizer liquid bottle was switched at the time of inspection. The sanitizer was retested and observed to be between 50-100 ppm after switching liquid. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024

At the time of inspection, raw eggs used for egg sandwiches were observed being mixed at the prep unit cutting board on separate deli paper. Per the PIC, to prevent possible cross-contamination of ready to eat items in the prep unit, eggs are to be prepared in a separate, protected location. Employees were observed switch to mixing eggs in the back room area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2024

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine was observed with an accumulation of bio-film. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice was voluntarily disposed of. Ice machine to be washed, rinsed, and sanitized prior to use. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2023
